query:
SELECT id, section, entity, status, current_stage, progress, resume_page, error_message,
  DATE_FORMAT(started_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS started,
  DATE_FORMAT(finished_at, '%H:%i:%s') AS finished,
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_at, IFNULL(finished_at, NOW())) AS dur_min
FROM sync_logs
WHERE section IN ('Boonphone','Fastfone365') AND entity = 'all'
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT 10;
